(LIBRARYNAME)


Dear Sir/Madam,

RE: (LETTERSUBJECT)

As per enclosure, we seek your cooperation in managing the bank draft under the vendor name by following the given information in the invoice.

Vendor Details :-
(VENDORNAME)

(VENDORADD1)

(INVOICE)(CURRENCY) (AMOUNT)

Yours sincerely,
